nodes.name: Schedule Trigger (DEACTIVATED)
nodes.notes: DEACTIVATED. When activated: fires daily at 07:00 local and generates one daily_task_plan row per active client. Mary receives a summary via email once that path is wired (Phase 11).

options.responseData: ={{ JSON.stringify({ ok: true, plan_id: $('Build Response').first().json.plan_id, task_count: $('Build Response').first().json.task_count, summary: $('Build Response').first().json.summary }) }}

nodes.name: Manual Trigger (Webhook)
nodes.notes: Body: { client_id (required), agent_id (optional, defaults to NULL — client-wide plan), plan_date (optional ISO date, defaults today) }. Used by the dashboard's 'Today's Plan' panel to refresh on demand.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-haiku-4-5-20251001', max_tokens: 2500, temperature: 0.1, system: $json.system_prompt, messages: [{ role: 'user', content: $json.user_prompt }] }) }}

nodes.name: Claude Rerank
nodes.notes: TODO: Bind 'Anthropic API' credential. No block yet — workflow falls back to base rank via Parse + Fallback.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ p_agent_id: $json.agent_id, p_client_id: $json.client_id, p_plan_date: $json.plan_date, p_tasks: $json.tasks, p_summary_line: $json.summary_line, p_generator_source: $json.generator_source }) }}
